header: Article Grid that feels ready to ship

items.title: What makes this pattern production-ready?
items.description: Built to show the article grid with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.

items.title: How does it stay theme-aware?
items.description: Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this article grid easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.

items.title: What should editors check first?
items.description: The seeded content keeps the component sleek, credible, and import-ready while staying inside the Desiderio shadcn design language.
